sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50427" key="i(mantope/dh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμαντο-πέδη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n50427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leathern noose</tr_>, of a polypus' leg, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.94</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> </bibl> Aeg.).</sense> </entryFree>
